Luca Ciamberlano

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Portrait Bust of a Woman with a Large Collar, from Perfect School to Learn How to Draw the Entire Human Body (English translation)
by Luca Ciamberlano
Italy · 1580–1641 · Engraving in black on ivory laid paper
←Ko, Chŏng-Sam Attributed to Bernardo Buontalenti, called delle Girandole, or his circle→
